languages.original_text: "Alas, there are too few organic components in these artefacts for my diagnostors to shed any light on their true age, and archaeological research has never been my strong suit."

languages.text: "Увы, в этих артефактах слишком мало органических составляющих, чтобы мои диагносторы могли пролить свет на их истинный возраст, а археологические изыскания никогда не были моей сильной стороной".
languages.translation_comment: found the belongings of all the Rogue Traders of Koronus in the Trazyn Museum (an exhibit with them)

languages.text: "Alas, there are too few organic components in these artefacts for my diagnostors to shed any light on their true age, and archaeological research has never been my strong suit."
languages.original_text: "Увы, в этих артефактах слишком мало органических составляющих, чтобы мои диагносторы могли пролить свет на их истинный возраст, а археологические изыскания никогда не были моей сильной стороной".

traits.locale_text: "Alas, there are too few organic components in these artefacts for my diagnostors to shed any light on their true age, and archaeological research has never been my strong suit."
"Alas, there are too few organic components in these artefacts for my diagnostors to shed any light on their true age, and archaeological research has never been my strong suit."
"Alas, there are too few organic components in these artefacts for my diagnostors to shed any light on their true age, and archaeological research has never been my strong suit."

languages.text: 「残念ですが、これらの遺物には有機成分がほとんど残っておらず、私の診断者たちはその真の年代を特定することができません。考古学の研究は私の得意分野ではありませんでした」
languages.original_text: "Alas, there are too few organic components in these artefacts for my diagnostors to shed any light on their true age, and archaeological research has never been my strong suit."

traits.locale_text: 「残念ですが、これらの遺物には有機成分がほとんど残っておらず、私の診断者たちはその真の年代を特定することができません。考古学の研究は私の得意分野ではありませんでした。」

languages.text: « Hélas, ces artefacts ne contiennent pas assez de composants organiques pour que mes diagnostiqueurs puissent nous révéler leur âge, et les recherches archéologiques ne sont pas mon fort. »
languages.original_text: "Alas, there are too few organic components in these artefacts for my diagnostors to shed any light on their true age, and archaeological research has never been my strong suit."

traits.locale_text: « Hélas, ces artefacts ne contiennent pas assez de composants organiques pour que mes diagnostiqueurs puissent nous révéler leur âge, et les recherches archéologiques ne sont pas mon fort. »

languages.text: "Leider enthalten diese Artefakte zu wenige organische Komponenten für meine Diagnostoren, um ihr wahres Alter zu ermitteln, und die Archäologie war nie meine Stärke."
languages.original_text: "Alas, there are too few organic components in these artefacts for my diagnostors to shed any light on their true age, and archaeological research has never been my strong suit."

traits.locale_text: "Leider enthalten diese Artefakte zu wenige organische Komponenten für meine Diagnostoren, um ihr wahres Alter zu ermitteln, und die Archäologie war nie meine Stärke."

languages.text: "Ne yazık ki bu eserlerde teşhisçilerimin gerçek yaşlarına ışık tutabilmesi için çok az organik bileşen var. Kaldı ki arkeolojik araştırmalar, hiçbir zaman güçlü yönüm olmamıştır."
languages.original_text: "Alas, there are too few organic components in these artefacts for my diagnostors to shed any light on their true age, and archaeological research has never been my strong suit."

traits.locale_text: "Ne yazık ki bu eserlerde teşhisçilerimin gerçek yaşlarına ışık tutabilmesi için çok az organik bileşen var. Kaldı ki arkeolojik araştırmalar, hiçbir zaman güçlü yönüm olmamıştır."

languages.text: «Por desgracia, estos artefactos carecen de suficientes componentes orgánicos para que mis diagnostors identifiquen su verdadera antigüedad, y los estudios arqueológicos nunca han sido mi fuerte».
languages.original_text: "Alas, there are too few organic components in these artefacts for my diagnostors to shed any light on their true age, and archaeological research has never been my strong suit."

traits.locale_text: «Por desgracia, estos artefactos carecen de suficientes componentes orgánicos para que mis diagnostors identifiquen su verdadera antigüedad, y los estudios arqueológicos nunca han sido mi fuerte».

languages.text: “可惜，这些遗物所含的有机成分太少，我的检测装置难以测定它们的真实年代。况且考古研究向来不是我的强项。”
languages.original_text: "Alas, there are too few organic components in these artefacts for my diagnostors to shed any light on their true age, and archaeological research has never been my strong suit."

traits.locale_text: “可惜，这些遗物所含的有机成分太少，我的检测装置难以测定它们的真实年代。况且考古研究向来不是我的强项。”
